name: Mary Stark
likes: Disney princesses, especially Moana, Mirabel from Encanto, and Elsa
Art supplies (markers, stickers, watercolors, glitter glue)
Plush animals, especially cats and bunnies
Pretend kitchen and grocery store play
Singing along to Encanto and Frozen soundtracks
dislikes: Anything featuring bugs, spiders, or snakes
Scratchy or itchy clothes (refuses to wear them)
Dolls with glassy lifelike faces (finds them creepy)
interests: Beginner ballet at the local studio
Watching Bluey and Encanto on repeat
notes: Mild dairy sensitivity (no chocolate gifts with milk in large quantities). Goes to bed at 7:30 PM and loves a new book every few weeks. Prefers soft, cuddly, or sparkly gifts.
